---
title: "Henry Jenner"
---

## Henry Jenner

**Dates:** (1848–1934)

### Description

Cornish scholar

### Biography

Eldest son of the Rt. Rev. Henry Jenner and Mary Isabel Finlaison, pioneer student of Cornish, assistant in the MS department of the British Museum.  He married Katharine Lee Rawlings in 1877. [ODNB; <i>Henry and Katharine Jenner</i> ed. Derek R. Williams  (London: Francis Boutle 2004)]

### Letters

- Letter from May 3d 1888
- Letter from Jany 23d 1883

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
